creator: ru@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, Oct 23, 2006 at 12:08:03PM +0000, Anton Shterenlikht wrote:
> I built a custom kernel with pcvt (vt) console driver enabled.
> I removed sc driver from the kernel configuration file.
> When I try to boot with this new kernel the machine freezes
> just after the kernel starts to load.
> 
> Machine:        Compaq Armada 1700 laptop
> 
The pcvt(4) driver has been removed from HEAD some time ago;
I doubt anyone is actually interested in fixing the issue.


Cheers,
-- 
Ruslan Ermilov
ru@FreeBSD.org
FreeBSD committer
